mapper.select:
/* PtnrAddSvcMapper.ptnrAddSvcHist */ SELECT RAT.RATE_CD , RAT.RATE_NM , PADD.PARTNER_ID AS PTNR_ID , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0243' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = PADD.PARTNER_ID) AS PTNR_NM , ARAT.RATE_CD AS ADD_SVC_CD , ARAT.RATE_NM AS ADD_SVC_NM , PADD.DC_CD , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP00016', PADD.DC_CD) AS DC_CD_NM , ARAT.BASE_AMT , PADD.POINT_VAL , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0242' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = PADD.USE_YN) AS USE_YN , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PADD.STRT_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS STRT_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PADD.END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS END_DATE , FN_GET_USRNM(PADD.RVISN_ID) AS USR_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST RAT , MSP_RATE_MST ARAT , MSP_PARTNER_ADD_SVC_HIST PADD WHERE RAT.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND RAT.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ARAT.SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' AND PADD.RATE_CD = RAT.RATE_CD AND PADD.ADD_SVC_CD = ARAT.RATE_CD
AND PADD.ADD_SVC_CD = #{addSvcCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY PADD.SEQ_NUM DESC

SELECT ARAT.RATE_CD AS VALUE ,ARAT.RATE_NM AS TEXT FROM MSP_RATE_MST RAT ,MSP_RATE_MST ARAT ,MSP_PROD_REL_MST REL WHERE RAT.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND RAT.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ARAT.SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' AND REL.RATE_CD = RAT.RATE_CD AND REL.ADD_SVC_CD = ARAT.RATE_CD AND RAT.RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY ARAT.RATE_NM ASC
mapper.insert: /* PtnrAddSvcMapper.ptnrAddSvcHistInsert */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_ADD_SVC_HIST ( SEQ_NUM , PARTNER_ID , RATE_CD , ADD_SVC_CD , DC_CD , POINT_VAL , USE_YN , STRT_DATE , END_DATE , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT SQ_MSP_PARTNER_ADD_SVC_HIST_01.nextVal , PARTNER_ID , RATE_CD , ADD_SVC_CD , DC_CD , POINT_VAL , USE_YN , STRT_DATE , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1/24/60/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_PARTNER_ADD_SVC_MST WHERE PARTNER_ID = #{ptnrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ADD_SVC_CD = #{addSvcCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: /* PtnrAddSvcMapper.getRateComboList */ SELECT A.RATE_CD AS VALUE , A.RATE_NM || ' ( ' || B.CD_DSC || ' )' AS TEXT FROM MSP_RATE_MST A ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST B ,MSP_PARTNER_RATE_MST C WHERE C.PARTNER_ID = #{ptnrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.RATE_CD = A.RATE_CD AND A.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.RATE_TYPE = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0047' ORDER BY 1

/* PtnrAddSvcMapper.ptnrAddSvcInfo */ SELECT RAT.RATE_CD , RAT.APPL_END_DT , RAT.APPL_STRT_DT , RAT.RATE_NM , RAT.RATE_TYPE , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0047' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = RAT.RATE_TYPE) AS RATE_TYPE_NM , RAT.DATA_TYPE , RAT.BASE_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST RAT WHERE RAT.SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' AND RAT.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND RAT.RATE_CD = #{addSvcCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY RAT.RATE_NM DESC
